introSection: Canyon Blaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located in the Bugs Bunny section of Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. The ride was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened on May 27, 1999. It is themed to the Road Runner and Wile E. Coyote.

sections.title: Appearances
sections.content: This attraction is featured in the 2021 film, Yes Day.

fullText:
Canyon Blaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located in the Bugs Bunny section of Six Flags Magic Mountain in Valencia, California, USA. The ride was built by E&F Miler Industries and opened on May 27, 1999. It is themed to the Road Runner and Wile E. Coyote.



Yellow track and green supports.



This attraction is featured in the 2021 film, Yes Day.
